commit_message:
[RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register [RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register - https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/999
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/979

examples.commit_message:
[RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register [RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register - https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/999
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/979
examples.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ module caliptra_ss_top
     ,parameter [4:0] SET_MCU_MBOX1_AXI_USER_INTEG   = { 1'b0,          1'b0,          1'b0,          1'b0,          1'b0}
     ,parameter [4:0][31:0] MCU_MBOX1_VALID_AXI_USER = {32'h4444_4444, 32'h3333_3333, 32'h2222_2222, 32'h1111_1111, 32'h0000_0000}
     ,parameter MCU_SRAM_SIZE_KB = 512
+    ,parameter MIN_MCU_RST_COUNTER_WIDTH = 4
 ) (
     input logic cptra_ss_clk_i,
     output logic cptra_ss_rdc_clk_cg_o,
@@ -1009,6 +1010,8 @@ module caliptra_ss_top
         .AXI_ID_WIDTH    ($bits(cptra_ss_mci_s_axi_if_r_sub.arid)  ),
         .MCU_SRAM_SIZE_KB(MCU_SRAM_SIZE_KB                         ),
 
+        .MIN_MCU_RST_COUNTER_WIDTH(MIN_MCU_RST_COUNTER_WIDTH       ),
+
         .MCU_MBOX0_SIZE_KB(MCU_MBOX0_SIZE_KB),
         .SET_MCU_MBOX0_AXI_USER_INTEG(SET_MCU_MBOX0_AXI_USER_INTEG),  
         .MCU_MBOX0_VALID_AXI_USER(MCU_MBOX0_VALID_AXI_USER),

examples.commit_message:
[RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register [RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register - https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/999
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/979

[RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register [RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register - https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/999
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/979

[RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register [RTL] Fix MCI parameters passed to register - https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/999
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-ss/issues/979
examples.patch:
@@ -568,6 +568,8 @@ mci_wdt_top #(
 // MCI Reg
 // MCI CSR bank
 mci_reg_top #(
+    .MCU_SRAM_SIZE_KB(MCU_SRAM_SIZE_KB), 
+    .MIN_MCU_RST_COUNTER_WIDTH(MIN_MCU_RST_COUNTER_WIDTH),
     .AXI_USER_WIDTH(AXI_USER_WIDTH),   
     .SET_MCU_MBOX0_AXI_USER_INTEG(SET_MCU_MBOX0_AXI_USER_INTEG),  
     .MCU_MBOX0_VALID_AXI_USER(MCU_MBOX0_VALID_AXI_USER),
